programmes.show_description: Richie Anderson is live from Salford with your Monday Motivation to kick start a brand new week, plus Secret Star and This Week in Songs.

programmes.show_name: The Blues Show with Cerys Matthews
programmes.show_description: Guitarist and producer Robin Trower, former member of Procol Harum, joins Cerys to share his favourite blues records and chat about the upcoming 50th celebration of his Live! album.

programmes.show_description: The best One Hit Wonders and the stories behind them. Want to hear your favourite One Hit Wonder on the show? Email OJ@bbc.co.uk.

programmes.show_name: The Jazz Show with Jamie Cullum
